title: Improve driver alert color coding, clarify road metrics, and enhance curved-road detection

requirements.text: Update the Driver Alerts UI to use clear status color-coding: show warning/danger/critical alerts in red, and show the safe/normal state in green.

quotes: for driver alert warning should given in red color and if it is safe then give in green

acceptanceCriteria: When there are no alerts (no obstacles, no emergency conditions, and not overspeed), the DriverAlertPanel “No alerts / All systems normal” state is visually styled as safe (green text/accent/background).

Any warning/danger state (including: speed limit exceeded, Warning emergencies, Moderate/High risk obstacles, Critical emergencies) is visually styled with red as the primary status color (not teal/yellow).
The updated colors are applied consistently across the DriverAlertPanel elements (headings/labels/badges/borders) without reducing readability in light and dark themes.

requirements.text: Improve the Detection Metrics ‘Road Information’ section so the road information is easier to understand at a glance, and explicitly communicates when no objects are detected.

quotes: for detection metrics road information should be clear and objects are not detected in it then

acceptanceCriteria: The ‘Road Information’ area clearly displays road type and object detection status with stronger visual hierarchy (labels vs values) than the current layout.
When the object detection result is empty/none/clear, the UI explicitly shows a clear 'No objects detected' (or equivalent) message rather than only relying on ambiguous text.
The metrics presentation remains compatible with both live and non-live modes and does not break existing MetricsPanel props usage.

requirements.text: Improve the road region segmentation algorithm so it better detects curved roads (the current system misses curves).

quotes: and in detection system it is not detecting the curves on road

acceptanceCriteria: Road masks produced by the road detection pipeline show improved continuity along curved road boundaries compared to the current behavior.
Remove or significantly reduce sources of non-determinism in road mask generation that can cause inconsistent road coverage between runs on the same image/frame.
Fix any mask post-processing issues that assume a square image (e.g., morphology operations using sqrt(length)) so morphology works correctly for arbitrary width/height inputs.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not edit immutable hook paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx.
nonGoals: Do not add new authentication methods beyond Internet Identity.
Do not introduce a new backend service or external database.
Do not implement real-time communication via WebSockets.
